use_cases: Display privacy policy and collect user consent for GDPR compliance
Required disclosure modal for websites and applications
Onboarding consent flow for new users
Cookie consent and data collection preferences
ai_summary: A privacy policy modal component from Ruixen.UI built with Radix UI and Tailwind CSS. Displays required legal disclosures and collects user consent for regulatory compliance. Features standard modal interactions including click-to-open functionality and keyboard navigation support for accessibility. Part of a shadcn/ui-style component library with consistent button variants.
